expectations.text: Defines acceptance criteria using [+] and [-] format
Tests follow Arrange-Act-Assert pattern with clear comments
expectations.evidence: All tests have // Arrange, // Act, // Assert comments

expectations.text: Uses AssertJ fluent assertions (assertThat) instead of JUnit assertions
expectations.evidence: All tests use assertThat() from AssertJ

expectations.text: Test method names follow method_scenario_expectedResult pattern
Tests cover both positive (happy path) and negative (error) scenarios
expectations.evidence: Tests for valid registration and email already exists cases
